news.title:
Indian renewable energy firms like Waaree, Vikram Solar, and Suzlon are diversifying into battery storage, EPC, and components to enhance margins and valuations.
Government policies promoting localization and integrated solutions drive this trend, with firms expanding through acquisitions and new ventures.
news.summary:
Indian renewable energy firms like Waaree, Vikram Solar, and Suzlon are diversifying into battery storage, EPC, and components to enhance margins and valuations.
Government policies promoting localization and integrated solutions drive this trend, with firms expanding through acquisitions and new ventures.

news.title:
Experts analyzed stocks: Jio Financial Services, IRCTC, L&T, Suzlon, Wipro, and Bajaj Auto on NDTV's 'Ask Profit'.
Buy: L&T, Suzlon; Hold: Jio Financial, IRCTC, Bajaj Auto; Avoid: Wipro. Analysts provided targets and stop-loss points.
news.summary:
Experts analyzed stocks: Jio Financial Services, IRCTC, L&T, Suzlon, Wipro, and Bajaj Auto on NDTV's 'Ask Profit'.
Buy: L&T, Suzlon; Hold: Jio Financial, IRCTC, Bajaj Auto; Avoid: Wipro. Analysts provided targets and stop-loss points.

news.title:
Centrum initiates 'Buy' ratings on NTPC Green, ACME Solar, Waaree Energies & Suzlon, projecting up to 75% upside.
Renewables, hybrid energy models, and storage tech seen driving India's power sector growth, with demand CAGR at 6%.
news.summary:
Centrum initiates 'Buy' ratings on NTPC Green, ACME Solar, Waaree Energies & Suzlon, projecting up to 75% upside.
Renewables, hybrid energy models, and storage tech seen driving India's power sector growth, with demand CAGR at 6%.

news.title:
Suzlon shares rose 3.4% to ₹41.3 after securing 100 MW wind project from GAIL.
Suzlon faces challenges like land, RoW issues; brokerages retain 'Buy' with targets ₹55-₹74.
news.summary:
Suzlon shares rose 3.4% to ₹41.3 after securing 100 MW wind project from GAIL.
Suzlon faces challenges like land, RoW issues; brokerages retain 'Buy' with targets ₹55-₹74.

news.title:
Suzlon Energy secures sixth consecutive ~100 MW order from Gail for a project in Maharashtra.
The project includes 47 S120 WTGs (2.1 MW each) and marks the fourth PSU order in FY26.
news.summary:
Suzlon Energy secures sixth consecutive ~100 MW order from Gail for a project in Maharashtra.
The project includes 47 S120 WTGs (2.1 MW each) and marks the fourth PSU order in FY26.

news.title:
Nifty 50 rebounded by 200 points, up 0.8%, after 3-session selloff driven by US-Iran war and crude price surge.
Vodafone Idea, Suzlon Energy, Tata Silver ETF, and Tata Gold ETF among top traded stocks; ETFs reflect commodity hedge interest.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 rebounded by 200 points, up 0.8%, after 3-session selloff driven by US-Iran war and crude price surge.
Vodafone Idea, Suzlon Energy, Tata Silver ETF, and Tata Gold ETF among top traded stocks; ETFs reflect commodity hedge interest.

news.title:
Suzlon Energy's stock plunged 8.3%, hitting ₹39.13, a 2-year low, amid prolonged correction since June 2025.
Brokerages retain 'Buy' ratings despite challenges, lowering target prices to ₹64 (JM Financial) and ₹55 (Nuvama).
news.summary:
Suzlon Energy's stock plunged 8.3%, hitting ₹39.13, a 2-year low, amid prolonged correction since June 2025.
Brokerages retain 'Buy' ratings despite challenges, lowering target prices to ₹64 (JM Financial) and ₹55 (Nuvama).

news.title:
Suzlon Energy to launch DevCo, diversifying into solar and BESS.
DevCo marks Suzlon's expansion beyond its wind turbine business.
news.summary:
Suzlon Energy to launch DevCo, diversifying into solar and BESS.
DevCo marks Suzlon's expansion beyond its wind turbine business.

news.title:
Suzlon announces management changes to focus on expansion plans.
Company aims to scale operations significantly over the next 3 years.
news.summary:
Suzlon announces management changes to focus on expansion plans.
Company aims to scale operations significantly over the next 3 years.

news.title:
Suzlon appoints Ajay Kapur as Group CEO; JP Chalasani joins Executive Council.
Suzlon denies Adani equity talks; shares down 0.3%, at ₹44.1, 6-month drop of 23.2%.
news.summary:
Suzlon appoints Ajay Kapur as Group CEO; JP Chalasani joins Executive Council.
Suzlon denies Adani equity talks; shares down 0.3%, at ₹44.1, 6-month drop of 23.2%.

news.title:
Suzlon Energy identifies key managerial personnel for materiality decisions and disclosures.
Company Secretary is assigned for stock exchange disclosures with investor contact details shared.
news.summary:
Suzlon Energy identifies key managerial personnel for materiality decisions and disclosures.
Company Secretary is assigned for stock exchange disclosures with investor contact details shared.

news.title:
Suzlon Energy forms GEC, appoints ex-Ambuja Cements MD Ajay Kapur as Group CEO starting February 2026.
The new leadership structure supports growth in solar, BESS, emerging tech, and diversified business models.
news.summary:
Suzlon Energy forms GEC, appoints ex-Ambuja Cements MD Ajay Kapur as Group CEO starting February 2026.
The new leadership structure supports growth in solar, BESS, emerging tech, and diversified business models.

news.title:
Suzlon Energy faces Rs.9.6 Cr penalty by Chennai customs for IGST short payment.
The company plans to appeal; financial impact hinges on appeal outcome.
news.summary:
Suzlon Energy faces Rs.9.6 Cr penalty by Chennai customs for IGST short payment.
The company plans to appeal; financial impact hinges on appeal outcome.

news.title:
Suzlon Energy's Rs.1.02 crore penalty for late PF ESI payment in FY17 dropped.
Tax authorities resolved the compliance issue; update shared with investors.
news.summary:
Suzlon Energy's Rs.1.02 crore penalty for late PF ESI payment in FY17 dropped.
Tax authorities resolved the compliance issue; update shared with investors.

news.title:
Suzlon Energy achieved 617 MW wind turbine deliveries in Q3 FY26, highest quarterly in India.
Order book grew to 6.4 GW; revenue up 58% YoY to ₹11,211 Cr, EBITDA up 77% YoY to ₹2,058 Cr.
news.summary:
Suzlon Energy achieved 617 MW wind turbine deliveries in Q3 FY26, highest quarterly in India.
Order book grew to 6.4 GW; revenue up 58% YoY to ₹11,211 Cr, EBITDA up 77% YoY to ₹2,058 Cr.

news.title:
Green energy companies showed mixed Q3 FY26 results, with Waaree Energies reporting 119% YoY revenue growth, Suzlon Energy's revenue up 42% YoY, and JSW Energy's profit surging 237% YoY.
KPI Green Energy's revenue grew 45% YoY, Borosil Renewables posted a 61% QoQ profit rise, while Saatvik Green Energy's profit jumped 147% YoY, boosted by strong order books and capacity expansions.
news.summary:
Green energy companies showed mixed Q3 FY26 results, with Waaree Energies reporting 119% YoY revenue growth, Suzlon Energy's revenue up 42% YoY, and JSW Energy's profit surging 237% YoY.
KPI Green Energy's revenue grew 45% YoY, Borosil Renewables posted a 61% QoQ profit rise, while Saatvik Green Energy's profit jumped 147% YoY, boosted by strong order books and capacity expansions.

news.title:
Suzlon Energy updated key managerial personnel contacts, including Chairman, Vice Chairman, CEO, CFO, and Secretary.
The update aims to enhance materiality assessment and disclosures.
news.summary:

news.title:
Suzlon Energy reports revenue growth, positive free cash flow, and reduced long-term debt.
The company shows improving operating margin, high ROCE, and P/E compression on the weekly timeframe.
